successCriteria.description: src/modules/policy/policy.model.ts exists and exports LeavePolicyType, LeavePolicy, CreateLeavePolicyDto, and UpdateLeavePolicyDto interfaces
src/modules/policy/policy.repository.ts exists and exports ILeavePolicyRepository interface
src/modules/policy/implementations/postgres-leave-policy.repository.ts exists and exports PostgresLeavePolicyRepository class implementing ILeavePolicyRepository
PostgresLeavePolicyRepository uses the exact SQL schema from canonical definitions and correctly maps between snake_case columns and camelCase properties
All repository methods are implemented with proper error handling and return types matching the declared stack (TypeScript + PostgreSQL)
ARCHITECTURE.md is updated to include the new LeavePolicyType enum domain concept

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Follows modular-monolith architecture with dependency direction: leave -> policy
Uses TypeScript, Node.js 20, Fastify, PostgreSQL, npm, and Vitest
All database access must go through ILeavePolicyRepository interface
PostgreSQL implementation must use the exact SQL schema provided
outOfScope: API endpoints or controllers for LeavePolicy
Any changes to existing employee module
Any changes to existing leave module
Any UI components or React Native code
